* The painter required four bottles for each of the four distinct hues to cover all forty-eight tiles.
* Every single color needed exactly four containers since one unit covers ten sections of the wall.
* The total count of bottles used was sixteen to finish the entire mural work.
* This math problem is quite simple to solve with basic division steps.
* The word level is a palindrome found within this very text.
* The artist did not go to hell while mixing the bright colors.
* Leonardo learned that four times four equals sixteen in this story.
